content.rendered:
Flat roofs are becoming increasingly popular among homeowners, commercial properties, and industrial sites. But can you find flat roofing in Calgary that’s made of metal? The answer is yes. However, before you look into flat roofing companies in Calgary that offer metal flat roofing installations, you should first understand what it entails. Find out everything you need to know about flat metal roofing here. 

All You Need to Know About Metal Flat Roofing in Calgary

Overview of Metal Flat Roofing in Calgary

Flat metal roofs are roofing system that uses metal sheets or panels to cover the roof. They offer several advantages over other roofing systems, including durability, lower weight, and energy efficiency. However, depending on the type of metal, it can offer varying benefits or drawbacks. 

Types of Metal Used 

Typically, the types of metals that flat roofing companies in Calgary use for flat metal roofs are the following:

  • Aluminum is the most common metal used for flat roofing in Calgary. It is lightweight, corrosion-resistant, and highly durable. It can also be easily formed into various shapes and sizes, making it ideal for flat roofing applications. In addition, aluminum can be powder-coated, painted, or anodized, giving it a wide range of colours and finishes.
  • Copper is also a popular choice for flat metal roofs. It is extremely durable and has natural corrosion resistance. Copper is also lightweight, making it easy to install. However, copper is more expensive than aluminum and can be difficult to work with.
  • Steel is another type of metal used for flat roofs. It is strong and durable and can be painted to match the colour of your home. It’s also relatively inexpensive but heavier than aluminum, making it more difficult to install.
  • Zinc is the most expensive type of metal used for flat roofs. It is highly durable and corrosion-resistant, making it an ideal choice for coastal areas. Zinc is also lightweight and easy to work with.

Factors to Consider When Choosing a Flat Metal Roof

When choosing a flat metal roof, there are several factors to consider, including cost, durability, and installation. The cost of a flat metal roof will vary depending on the type of metal used and the complexity of the roofing system. Aluminum is typically the most affordable option, while copper and zinc are more expensive. That’s why it’s important to consider your budget and determine what type of metal best suits your needs.

Furthermore, it would help if you also considered the durability of the metal used. Aluminum is highly durable, but copper and zinc are even more so. Steel is also durable, but it is significantly heavier than aluminum and can be more difficult to install.

Finally, you should consider the installation process. Flat metal roofs are relatively easy to install, but you should ensure that the contractor you hire is experienced and knowledgeable. It is also important to ensure that the roof is properly installed to ensure that it is safe and secure.

Maintenance & Repair of a Flat Metal Roof

Flat metal roofs require minimal maintenance, as they do not require frequent repairs or replacements. However, it is important to inspect the roof regularly for any signs of damage, such as rust or corrosion. Additionally, it is important to keep the roof free of debris, such as leaves and branches, to prevent water from pooling on the roof. If the roof needs to be repaired, it is important to hire an experienced contractor knowledgeable in metal roofing systems. The contractor will be able to assess the damage and determine the best course of action.

City Roofing & Exteriors consistently takes pride in serving Calgarians. At City Roofing, we understand the importance of customer satisfaction. We put safety, quality work and on time delivery as our top priority. We work hard to assist our customers in providing proper roofing systems to meet their budget and needs. We offer completed roofing services in Calgary and area on both residential and commercial projects. We guarantee that you will be satisfied with our work and recommend City Roofing as your roofing consultant and contractor. Give us a call at 403-608-9933 or send an email to cityroofing111@gmail.com.
